[https://www.amd.com/en.html AMD]. ==About== ===Broadcast Talent=== {{BroadcasterCard |b1=SardarjiYT |b2=Gamezotech }} ===Format=== * '''Upthrust Esports - The Multiverse Series 2024''' - ''Jan 8th - 17th ** 24 teams. ** Squad , {{Abbr/TPP}} * '''Semi Finals''' - ''Jan 8th - 12th ** 24 teams are divided equally into 3 groups of 8 teams each. ** 5 matchdays. ** Round-robin format. ** {{bgcolortext|up|Top 16 teams}} qualify for the ''Grand Finals. * '''Grand Finals''' - ''Jan 13th - 17th ** 16 teams. ** 5 matchdays. ** 30 matches (6 each day). {{PUBGM 2021 Points
